cover.era_chip: 朝鮮 前期 · 經濟
cover.subtitle:
관허 상점과 5일장,
중농억상의 그림자.
cover.imagePrompt: Joseon folk minhwa + genre-painting tones. Hanji beige, ink-black, crimson, navy. Scene: a busy Hanyang market street with rows of small wooden sijeon shops selling bolts of cloth and stacks of paper, and a few traveling bobusang merchants with A-frame backpacks (jige) walking past. A magistrate official in dopo and gat oversees the scene. Behind: tile-roofed shops and a glimpse of Jongno street. Composition: lively but orderly commerce. Color: hanji beige + ink-black + warm earth-brown + small crimson signboard accents. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

items.name: 태종
items.desc: 저화 발행, 화폐 유통 첫 시도.

outro.tip_body: 심화에서는 조선 전기 화폐(저화·조선통보) 모두 유통 실패, 상평통보(숙종, 1678)는 조선 후기임을 구분할 것. 과전법(전·현직) → 직전법(현직만)의 변화도 핵심.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized round Korean coin with a square hole, and to the right a folded bolt of cloth (po) suggesting practical currency. Cream #F2EDE3 base + ink-black outline + warm copper-amber #B45309 accent on the coin. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.
